title: rubus × okae
intro: Rubus × okae is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, resulting from the cross between a black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and a red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × okae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide anti-cancer properties. Rubus × okae is commonly prepared as a tea, juice, or tincture, and can also be consumed raw as a fruit to reap its numerous health benefits.
